import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      p
    when None
      ""
    end
    let num = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let sq = num * num
    if i == 0
      result = "#{sq}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{sq}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
